title: Credential Verification and Validation
pleaseWait: Please wait while we verify your credential.
unsuccessfulVerification: This credential was not verified successfully.
warningVerification: There is a warning about this credential.

log.generalError: There was an error verifing this credential.
log.unknownError: There was an unknown error verifing this credential.
log.wellFormed: is in a supported credential format
log.malFormed: is not a recognized credential type
log.knownIssuer: has been issued by a known issuer
log.unknownIssuer: isn't in a known issuer registry
log.uncheckedRevocation: Revocation status could not be checked

signingError: This credential cannot be verified. Note that the JSON code is sensitive to changes in code text including spaces and characters. Please ensure you have input the correct code.
signingErrorDetail: Something has changed in the credential so that the electronic signature no longer matches the content. This could be something as simple as inadvertently adding a space.
unknownErrorDetail: Please try again, or let us know.
